use_cases: Displaying team member profiles on about or team pages with a space-efficient expandable design
Showing author or contributor information in developer documentation and portfolios
Featuring user profiles in social platforms with minimal screen footprint
Creating compact contact cards that expand on hover for sidebar or footer sections
Adding interactive team member cards to onboarding or introduction flows
ai_summary: An interactive profile card component with glass-morphism styling that expands from a compact circular avatar to reveal user details on hover. Features smooth spring-physics animations using Framer Motion, with elegant blur-to-clear text reveals and fluid horizontal expansion. Supports both light and dark modes, includes GitHub social integration, and is optimized for space-constrained UI areas like sidebars and team sections.
